source_pr.title: tests, statistics: move IT tests in `statistics` to `tests/integrationtest`
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #47222

Problem Summary: Move 2 + 6 +3 = 11 test cases, reduce 1 test cases.

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->  

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: The case only records `race = "on"` as a signal. This PR migrates statistics integration tests; without CI logs/repro we conservatively avoid inferring a flaky root cause category.
analysis:
PR title: tests, statistics: move IT tests in `statistics` to `tests/integrationtest`
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/47235
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: race = "on",
Changed files (12): statistics/BUILD.bazel, statistics/handle/handletest/BUILD.bazel, statistics/handle/handletest/handle_test.go, statistics/handle/handletest/lockstats/BUILD.bazel, statistics/handle/handletest/lockstats/lock_table_stats_test.go, statistics/integration_test.go, tests/integrationtest/r/statistics/handle.result, tests/integrationtest/r/statistics/integration.result, tests/integrationtest/r/statistics/lock_table_stats.result, tests/integrationtest/t/statistics/handle.test, tests/integrationtest/t/statistics/integration.test, tests/integrationtest/t/statistics/lock_table_stats.test
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
